about.title: Helping Bangladesh stay tax-ready with clarity and confidence
about.description: Smart Tax BD combines tax expertise with a modern client experience. We simplify filing, documentation, and advisory support so you can focus on your work while we handle the complexity.

expertGuidance.title: Expert Guidance
expertGuidance.description: Our tax specialists help individuals and businesses make confident tax decisions.

trustedCompliance.title: Trusted Compliance
trustedCompliance.description: We keep your filings aligned with current regulations and reduce compliance risk.

fastDigitalWorkflow.title: Fast Digital Workflow
fastDigitalWorkflow.description: Track requests, upload files, and manage tax orders from a single portal.

about.reason1: Personalized support for salaried professionals, freelancers, and businesses.
about.reason2: Clear process from document collection to final filing.
about.reason3: Secure, transparent communication throughout every step.

contact.title: Let's discuss your tax needs
contact.description: Reach out to our team for service details, onboarding support, or help with your ongoing tax requests.
contact.nextStepsDesc: Already have an account? Create a tax order directly and we'll follow up with document requirements and estimated timelines.

news.title: News & Announcements
news.description: Stay up to date with the latest tax news, regulatory changes, and important announcements from Smart Tax BD.

privacy.title: Your Privacy Matters to Us
privacy.description: We are committed to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it.

infoWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
infoWeCollect.body: We collect information you provide directly — such as your name, mobile number, email address, and tax-related documents — when you register or use our services.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.body: Your information is used to process tax orders, communicate updates, verify identity, and improve our services. We do not sell your data to third parties.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.body: We implement industry-standard encryption and access controls to protect your personal and financial data at rest and in transit.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting our support team.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, email us at support@smarttaxbd.com or visit our Contact page.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Please read these terms carefully before using Smart Tax BD services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using Smart Tax BD, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

services.title: Use of Services
services.body: Our services are intended for lawful tax filing and advisory purposes in Bangladesh. You agree not to misuse the platform or submit false information.

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

payment.title: Payment & Fees
payment.body: Service fees are displayed before payment confirmation. All payments are final unless stated otherwise. Refunds are subject to our refund policy.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: Smart Tax BD provides information and filing assistance but is not liable for penalties arising from inaccurate information submitted by users.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms periodically. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

taxTypes.title: Tax Services
taxTypes.description: Navigate the complexities of Bangladeshi tax law with our specialized services. We provide accurate, timely, and compliant solutions for every tax category.
taxTypes.noCategories: No tax categories found right now
taxTypes.noCategoriesDesc: Please check back shortly or contact support for assistance.
